body_txt: A Stock Phrase used to describe someone who pines for/stays with someone they don't love ( or who treats them poorly ) because they don't want to be alone. The implication is that the character cares more about being in a romantic relationship with someone than the person they're having the relationship with. Since this attitude is exactly as unhealthy as it sounds, such a character invariably ends up Looking for Love in All the Wrong Places . They may be Allergic to Routine and have a hard time sticking around because they believe True Love Is Boring . This can result in Loving a Shadow or be used as a Retcon when a hyped relationship becomes an Aborted Arc . See also Serial Romeo , where a character seeks out several relationships in quick succession but genuinely loves each person they pursue. Not to be confused with a Love Freak who is literally in love with the concept of love. Can be a result of aromanticism .
